Labour and Service Laws

Overview

Providing legal assistance in industrial disputes, service matters of government employees, domestic inquiries, suspension challenges, and compliance with labour codes.

Key Areas of Focus

  • ✓ Industrial Disputes & Wrongful Terminations
  • ✓ Service Writs in High Court (CAT cases)
  • ✓ Gratuity, PF, and Wage claims
  • ✓ Drafting Employment Contracts

Primary Legislation & Statutes

Industrial Disputes Act, 1947 Industrial Employment (Standing Orders) Act, 1946 Central Administrative Tribunal (CAT) regulations

Frequently Asked Questions

CAT was established to adjudicate disputes and complaints regarding recruitment and conditions of service of persons appointed to public services and posts in connection with the affairs of the Union or other local authorities.

Need Legal Assistance?

Schedule a confidential consultation with our legal experts today.
